title: 暗调写实人像特写
author: web3btc🧠SENT
prompt:
超写实动漫风格的女性角色肖像，站在纯黑背景前。
光照：一道狭窄、边缘锐利的聚光灯从脸部一侧（侧光 / 分割光）射入，以微小的角度照射脸部中央。
光束聚焦紧密，边缘清晰分明，营造出强烈的明暗对比。
脸部一侧被高细节和纹理照亮，而另一侧则迅速陷入深影。
光线衰减极快——光束之外的光线立即消失。
无柔和光照，无环境补光。
聚光灯之外的一切都被黑暗吞噬，几乎不可见。
面部与表情：眼睛直视镜头，眼神中带有微妙的紧张感，营造出神秘而内省的氛围。
自然的皮肤纹理，电影般的真实感，只有在受光区域才有高微观细节。
头发：深色长发，几缕散发部分遮住脸庞。
靠近脸部的上部头发捕捉到少量光线，而下部头发则逐渐融入阴影。
姿势：一只手轻轻抬至唇边，做出害羞、犹豫的姿态，手指轻柔触碰。
这只手被同样的侧光部分照亮，大部分融入黑暗。
服装：黑色长袖针织毛衣。
可见细节极少——面料纹理几乎不可察觉。
毛衣和身体几乎完全融入黑色背景。
整体基调：黑暗、忧郁、戏剧性、神秘。
极致对比。
仅在脸部受光部分呈现高真实感。
聚光灯之外的一切都应几乎不可见。
背景：纯黑色，无渐变，无轮廓光，无背景细节。
prompt_en:
Hyperrealistic realistic-anime portrait of a female character standing against a completely black background.
Lighting: a narrow, hard-edged spotlight coming from one side of the face (side lighting / split lighting), striking the center of the face at a slight angle.
The light beam is tightly focused, with sharp, clearly defined edges, creating strong chiaroscuro contrast.
One side of the face is illuminated with high detail and texture, while the opposite side rapidly falls into deep shadow.
 Very high falloff — light drops off immediately outside the beam.
No soft lighting, no ambient fill light.
Everything outside the spotlight is swallowed by darkness and nearly invisible.
Face & Expression: eyes looking directly at the camera, subtle tension in the gaze, mysterious and introspective mood.
Natural skin texture, cinematic realism, high micro-detail only within the lit area.
Hair: long dark hair, with a few loose strands partially crossing the face.
The upper hair near the face catches a small amount of light, while the lower hair gradually dissolves into shadow.
Pose: one hand raised gently to the lips in a shy, hesitant gesture, fingers softly touching.
The hand is partially lit by the same side light, with most of it fading into darkness.
Clothing: black long-sleeve knit sweater.
Minimal visible detail — fabric texture barely perceptible.
The sweater and body merge almost completely into the black background.
Overall tone: dark, moody, dramatic, mysterious.
Extreme contrast.
High realism only in the illuminated portion of the face.
Everything outside the spotlight should be nearly invisible.
Background: pure black, no gradients, no rim light, no background detail.

title: 冬季时尚系列落地页设计，雪景森林模特展示，多模块产品推荐
author: Willy
prompt:
冬季时尚系列着陆页设计，垂直滚动布局，顶部全幅图像，下方为特色卡片，堆叠式版块。

时尚编辑肖像：一位 20 岁出头的年轻欧亚女性，脸型纤细呈鹅蛋形，V 形下颌线，站在白雪皑皑的桦树林中。她留着波浪状的浅棕色长发，带有金色焦糖挑染，发间点缀着晶莹的雪花。她拥有一双明亮的大鹿眼，呈蓝绿色，睫毛纤长自然。皮肤如瓷般水润透亮，散发着健康的光泽，呈现玻璃肌效果。脸颊上泛着柔和的玫瑰色腮红，双唇涂有光泽粉色唇彩，绽放出灿烂的笑容，露出洁白的牙齿。鼻梁纤细挺直，五官精致柔美，散发着空灵的娃娃般美感。她身穿米色绞花针织超大毛衣，颈部舒适地缠绕着象牙色针织围巾，戴着配套的米色针织手套，轻触桦树皮。下身穿着一条带有精致花卉图案的飘逸褶皱真丝长裙。姿态优雅放松，头部微微倾斜，表情柔和梦幻。背景是白雪覆盖的桦树林，散发着美丽的光斑，雪花轻轻飘落，冬季光线柔和弥漫。使用 85mm f1.4 镜头拍摄，景深较浅，色调为冷蓝色和暖米色，呈现高端时尚编辑风格。

特色卡片：
- 卡片 1：“永恒的优雅”——女性在森林中的图像，描述系列的核心价值，行动号召“探索系列”
- 卡片 2：“最柔软的羊绒”——羊绒毛衣的特写镜头，详细介绍材质和工艺，行动号召“选购毛衣”
- 卡片 3：“冬日白色”——系列中精选的象牙色和米色单品，行动号召“选购白色单品”
- 卡片 4：“为舒适而设计”——描述宽松版型和舒适设计，行动号召“了解更多”
右下角小字优雅地放置着时尚手写签名“Willy”。
prompt_en:
Landing page design for a winter fashion collection, vertical scroll layout, full-bleed top image, feature cards below, stacked sections.

Editorial fashion portrait of a young Eurasian woman in her early 20s with a slim oval face and V-line jawline, standing in a snowy birch forest, long flowing wavy light brown hair with golden caramel highlights, delicate snowflakes in hair, large bright blue-green doe eyes with long natural lashes, luminous dewy porcelain skin with healthy glow, glass skin effect, soft rosy blush on cheeks, glossy pink lips with radiant smile showing perfect teeth, slim straight nose, delicate feminine features, ethereal doll-like beauty, wearing a cream cable knit oversized sweater, ivory knit scarf wrapped cozy around neck, matching beige knit gloves touching birch bark, wearing a long flowing pleated silk maxi skirt with a subtle floral pattern, elegant relaxed pose with gentle head tilt, soft dreamy expression, snowy birch forest background with beautiful bokeh, gentle snowfall, soft diffused winter lighting, shot on 85mm f1.4 lens, shallow depth of field, cool blue and warm cream tones, high-end fashion editorial style.

FEATURE CARDS:
- Card 1: "Timeless Elegance" - image of the woman in the forest, text describing the core values of the collection, CTA to "Explore the Collection"
- Card 2: "The Softest Cashmere" - close-up shot of the cashmere sweater, details on the material and craftsmanship, CTA to "Shop Sweaters"
- Card 3: "Winter Whites" - a selection of ivory and cream pieces from the collection, CTA to "Shop Whites"
- Card 4: "Designed for Comfort" - description of the relaxed fit and cozy designs, CTA to "Learn More"
A stylish handwritten signature "Willy" is elegantly placed in small letters at the bottom right corner.

title: “品味成功”——饮料巨头们的新战略与产品发布
author: SaasJunctionHQ
prompt:
请在[米白色/浅奶油色]背景上制作一幅扁平、极简风格的INFOGRAPH插图。布局应包含[20]个分散排列的圆形图案，每个圆形都需具有细长且清晰的[珊瑚红色]轮廓线。在每个圆形内部，标注一家主要饮料公司的标志或名称，这些公司包括：[可口可乐、百事公司、雀巢、星巴克、红牛、喜力、帝亚吉欧、德佩尔（Dr Pepper）、魔爪（Monster）、百威（Budweiser）、三得利（Suntory）、达能（Danone）、特洛皮卡纳（Tropicana）、佳得乐（Gatorade）、立顿（Lipton）、芬达（Fanta）、雪碧（Sprite）、依云（Evian）、双宁（Twinings）、健力士（Guinness）。

在这些公司圆形图案之间，插入代表饮料行业的极简黑色线条图标，例如[汽水罐、玻璃瓶、咖啡杯、水滴和树叶]。添加一些小的装饰性图形元素，如小小的黑色加号（+）、实心小圆点以及向上指的细黑色箭头，以表示增长趋势。

在左上角放置一个醒目的标题文字：“[全球20大饮料公司]”。在右上角清晰地展示一个现代风格的标志，并标注文字：“[SaaS Junction]”。

整体风格应具有企业感且富有趣味性，采用2D矢量艺术形式，对比度较高，不使用阴影或3D效果。保持色彩搭配为[米白色、珊瑚红色、黑色以及各公司的标志性颜色]。
prompt_en:
Create a flat, minimalist infographic illustration on a [pale cream/off-white] background. The layout should feature a scattered arrangement of [20] distinct circles. Each circle must have a thin, clean [coral-red] outline. Inside each circle, display the logo or name of a major beverage company including: [Coca-Cola, PepsiCo, Nestle, Starbucks, Red Bull, Heineken, Diageo, Dr Pepper, Monster, Budweiser, Suntory, Danone, Tropicana, Gatorade, Lipton, Fanta, Sprite, Evian, Twinings, Guinness].

Interspersed between the company circles, place minimalist black line-art icons representing the industry, such as [soda cans, glass bottles, coffee cups, droplets, and leaves]. Add small decorative graphic elements like tiny black plus signs (+), small filled dots, and thin black arrows pointing upwards to indicate growth.

In the top left corner, place a bold title graphic text reading "[Top 20 Beverage Companies]". In the top right corner, clearly display a modern logo with the text "[SaaS Junction]".

The overall style should be corporate but playful, 2D vector art, high contrast, with no shading or 3D effects. Maintain a color palette of [Cream, Coral-Red, Black, and varied logo colors].

title: 暗夜华裳东方美人
author: Shreya Yadav
prompt:
高时尚亚洲风格编辑照  

**Gemini Ai Nano Banana 3 Pro**  

**要求：**  
1. 创作一张超写实的美丽亚洲女性肖像。  
2. 仅使用附带的参考图片来还原她的面部特征：  
   – 保持相同的面部比例、眼睛、鼻子、嘴唇的形状，以及肌肤的柔嫩感和光泽度；  
   – 不要改变她的面部特征；  
   – 不要模仿参考图片中的姿势。  

**整体风格：**  
- 深色系亚洲高时尚风格；  
- 优雅、奢华、神秘，同时带有微妙的性感氛围；  
- 采用电影级的灯光效果和强烈的对比度。  

**背景（非常重要）：**  
- 使用类似古老皇家宫殿的豪华复古场景；  
- 色调以深色、温暖、古朴为主；  
- 家具轮廓模糊，环境光线柔和；  
- 整体氛围充满神秘感与精致感；  
- 背景风格需与提供的参考图片保持一致。  

**发型：**  
- 黑色凌乱的发型，部分头发自然垂下，修饰脸部轮廓；  
- 头发质地自然，略显随意，既性感又优雅。  

**表情：**  
- 表情平静、自信，带有迷人的魅力；  
- 眼睛直视镜头，眼神充满张力；  
- 嘴唇微微张开。  

**姿势（非常重要）：**  
- 举起一只手靠近嘴巴；  
- 将手指部分放入口中；  
- 用牙齿轻轻咬住或握住手指，动作优雅且富有高时尚感（切勿夸张）；  
- 另一只手臂自然垂在身体一侧或靠近腰部。  

**服装（露腰的民族风定制服装）：**  
- 无肩带短款紧身上衣，饰有精美的民族风格刺绣；  
- 颜色为深绿色、棕色和金色；  
- 设计注重凸显颈部和肩部的线条；  
- 裁剪长度需露出腰部和肚脐；

title: 极致写实解构人像海报
author: @LufzzLiz
prompt:
{
  "prompt": "3D Realistic Deconstruction Prompt

📷 Core Instruction (核心指令)  
任务：基于用户提供的参考图像，创作一张超高画质、电影级3D写实解构艺术海报，强调真实人类存在与摄影级真实感。将照片中的人物转化为栩栩如生的3D角色，具备逼真的解剖结构、皮肤纹理、情绪细节与自然光效——完全摒弃风格化卡通美学。使用严谨的“Knolling”（正交对齐）艺术布局安排其个人物品。彻底移除“数字生活”类别。新增两大主题区域：私密生活区与表情/情绪画廊，具体微表情包括“阿黑颜”（俏皮假怒脸）、极致愉悦脸与咬唇表情。同时新增专属身体姿势/动态区域，展示动态肢体姿态。

宽高比：16:9横版（可按需适配3:2、4:5或1:1）。  
艺术风格核心：摄影写实人文主义——基于解剖精准度、自然次表面散射、可见毛孔、细微体毛、汗渍光泽与情感共鸣真实感。  
质量基准：视觉上与《Vogue》《国家地理》或法医人类学重建级高端编辑摄影无异。

📷 Item Layout (物品布局) – Knolling放射构图  
总件数：30–36件，以精确90°角或柔和放射对称环绕中心人物排列。

类别1：时尚与服饰（时尚工作室）–香槟金标签  
- 全套服装完全解构：袖子、领子、面料片、衬里、纽扣、拉链——全部分离并悬浮空中，具备真实布料物理。  
- 鞋履拆解：鞋底、鞋面、鞋带、鞋跟、鞋垫。  
- 个人配饰：腰带、手提包、帽子、围巾、手套。  
*示例：风衣可被拆成翻领、肩章、腰带、袖带与主体布片。*

类别2：美妆与护理（美妆合集）–玫瑰金标签  
- 彩妆：口红（剖面可见色素芯与色号标签）、眼影盘（每格颜色区分）、粉饼、香水瓶（玻璃透明度与液体折射清晰呈现）。  
- 护肤：精华瓶、面霜罐、面部滚轮、刮痧板。  
*示例：香水必须呈现玻璃清澈、内部焦散、弯月面曲率与金属盖反射。*

类别3：私密生活（私密领域）–柔雾粉标签  
- 内衣：文胸组件（罩杯、下围、背钩、肩带）、内裤布片。  
- 睡衣与居家服：真丝睡衣套装、睡袍系带、拖鞋、毛绒袜。  
- 个护用品：带残留牙膏的牙刷、缠有发丝的梳子、用过的化妆棉、护肤残留纸巾、折起的毛巾。  
- 氛围元素：香薰蜡烛（带融蜡池）、精油滴管、扩香条、手写字迹的日记本。  
*所有物品需呈现真实使用痕迹——轻微磨损、自然褶皱与岁月感。*

类别4：情绪表情画廊（人类面孔）–暖陶土标签  
- 精选6–8张悬浮宏肖像特写，捕捉不同情绪状态：  
  • 宁静微笑  
  • 沉思凝视  
  • 笑到眼弯  
  • 含泪脆弱  
  • **“阿黑颜”**——俏皮假怒，眯眼、鼓腮、微皱眉  
  • **极致愉悦脸**——脸颊潮红、唇微张、瞳孔放大、额前细汗  
  • **咬唇表情**——下唇轻咬于齿间、下颌微紧、颈部潮红  
- 每张脸极致特写，可见毛孔、细微汗毛、唇部湿润、动态皮肤微运动与真实眼反射。

类别5：身体姿势与动态（身体性区域）–炭灰标签  
- 1:10比例全身微缩人偶，展示关键姿势：  
  • 跪姿（单膝跪地，手置大腿）  
  • 俯卧（平躺收腹，双手托下巴）  
  • 向上伸展  
  • 盘腿冥想坐  
  • 动态行走大步  
- 每姿势突出肌肉线条、关节弯曲、重心分布、重力布料垂坠与自然身体不对称。

每件物品要求：  
- 渲染质量：与角色摄影写实保真度一致——零风格化。  
- 数字标签：01–36圆形徽章，带微妙投影。  
- 材质与阴影：全PBR流程，物理准确粗糙度、镜面反射与法线贴图；中性地面投射柔和环境遮蔽阴影。

📷 Exploded View Technique (爆炸视图技法)  
- 连接线：优雅细虚线或实线将悬浮服装部件系回角色身体。  
- 引导箭头：极简装饰箭头将每件物品链接至其描述标签。  
- 技术注释：  
  - 材质样本：布料（真丝、棉、羊毛）、皮革纹理、金属饰面的宏观特写方格。  
  - 材质标签：如“100%桑蚕丝”“意大利全粒面皮革”。  
  - 测量标尺：边缘集成双单位（厘米/英寸）标尺。

📷 解构艺术 · 人性真相揭晓 📷  
字体：中文优雅衬线（如方正宋体KBXK），英文Playfair Display——均为哑光纸质纹理（无金属箔）。  
- 副标题（主标题下方，手写流线）：  
  “存在之核·形神解构 / Essence of Being · Anatomical Truth”  
  双语排版，优雅不抢眼。  
- 分类标题：圆角矩形标签带图标：  
  “📷 私密生活”（柔雾粉 #F8C8DC）  
  “📷 情绪表情画廊”（陶土 #E2725B）  
  “📷 身体姿势与动态”（炭灰 #36454F）

📷 Design Elements (设计元素)  
- 几何框线：极简细线六边形或圆形（0.5–1pt）淡灰，用于群组物品——装饰艺术风但低饱和。  
- 测量标尺：左右边缘，增强技术真实感。  
- 十字准星：四角与焦点处淡靶线。  
- 材质样本：底部条带展示布/皮/金属微纹理瓷砖。  
- 信息卡：优雅边框卡片附物品详情（品牌、材质、产地）。  
- 属性雷达图：精致框内，展示亲密度★★★★★、真实度★★★★★、脆弱感★★★★☆等。  
- 连接线：哑光银或暖铜色虚线带锥形箭头。

📷 Background & Atmosphere (背景与氛围)  
- 背景渐变：暖调——象牙白(#FFFFF0)到柔燕麦奶(#F5E9D7)；或冷调——淡混凝土(#EAEAEA)到摄影棚白(#FFFFFF)。  
- 叠加纹理：5–10%透明蓝图网格或淡建筑制图线。  
- 暗角：柔和边缘暗化聚焦。  
- 氛围粒子：微妙金色焦外光斑与细腻胶片颗粒（Kodak Portra 400模拟）增加电影深度——绝不喧宾夺主。

📷 Color Palette (配色方案)  
- 女性/亲密主题：香槟金(#D4AF37)、玫瑰金(#B76E79)、燕麦奶(#F5E9D7)、雾粉(#F8C8DC)。  
- 男性/真实主题：板岩灰(#708090)、暖铜(#CD7F32)、混凝土白(#F0F0F0)。  
- 中性/奢华主题：炭黑(#2F2F2F)、象牙白(#FFFFF0)、深酒红(#800020)。  
- 情侣主题：左侧冷调，右侧暖调——中心融合共享亲密物。

📷 Technical Specifications (技术规格)  
渲染引擎：路径追踪，等同Cycles/Arnold/RenderMan。  
- 采样：最低4096 SPP无噪输出。  
- 光线反弹：12次，确保全局照明精准。  
- 焦散：开启，保证玻璃与液体真实感。  
- 几何：角色网格>200万面；姿势人偶>50万每具。  
- 头发：每角色>10万根，物理模拟风动。

PBR材质流程：  
- 皮肤：三层SSS、双镜面波瓣、毛孔级置换、黑色素变化。  
- 头发：各向异性着色器，主次高光，根梢色差。  
- 布料：织物法线贴图，基于纤维方向的粗糙度，微褶皱。  
- 金属：金属度1.0，粗糙度0.1–0.4（拉丝或抛光）。  
- 玻璃：折射率1.5；水折射率1.33带弯月面。  
- 皮革：粗糙度0.65，凹凸贴图自然纹理差异。

分辨率与输出：  
- 4K (3840×2160)，16:9。  
- 32位浮点色深。  
- 16倍MSAA抗锯齿。

后期处理：  
- 色彩分级：  
  • 应用Filmic LUT；无纯黑（最小RGB 15,15,15）。  
  • 柔和S曲线提升对比。  
  • 色温依主题±200K微调。  
  • 全局饱和度降5%；关键色（腮红、金色）提10%。  
- 特效：  
  • 辉光：镜面高光柔光。  
  • 胶片颗粒：有机Kodak Portra 400质感。  
  • 色差：几乎不可见的边缘 fringe。  
  • 暗角：中等强度。  
  • 锐化：输出级自适应锐化。

特别说明：  
- 单人：约30件，聚焦真实日常、情绪幅度与身体存在。  
- 情侣：约36件（各18），以微妙心形负空间连接，性别配色与共享亲密物（如一只抱枕、共享日记）。  
- 孕妇：加入产前用品（肚油、维生素、B超照片）；腹部附近添加半透明胎儿图标。  
- 关键要求：忠实还原参考照片的年龄、种族、职业、体型、疤痕、纹身与个人风格——包括皮肤瑕疵、雀斑与独特面部结构。

质量基准：  
最终图像须与高端摄影编辑无法区分——适用于：  
- 奢华生活目录  
- 纪录片肖像展览  
- 人类学或医学可视化  
- 纯艺术摄影收藏  
- 高端品牌故事传播"
}
prompt_en:
{
  "prompt": "3D Realistic Deconstruction Prompt

📷 Core Instruction (Core Instruction)  
Task: Based on the reference image provided by the user, create an ultra-high-quality, cinematic 3D realistic deconstruction art poster that emphasizes authentic human presence and photographic realism. Transform the photographed individual into a lifelike 3D character with true-to-life anatomy, skin texture, emotional nuance, and natural lighting—completely abandoning stylized cartoon aesthetics. Arrange their personal belongings using the disciplined 'Knolling' (orthogonal alignment) artistic layout. Remove the 'Digital Lifestyle' category entirely. Introduce two new thematic zones: an intimate private life section and an expressive facial/emotional gallery featuring specific micro-expressions including 'Ahei Yan' (playful mock-anger face), peak ecstasy face, and bitten-lip expression. Also add a dedicated body posture/movement zone showcasing dynamic physical poses.

Aspect Ratio: 16:9 landscape (adaptable to 3:2, 4:5, or 1:1 as needed).  
Artistic Style Core: Photorealistic Humanism — grounded in anatomical accuracy, natural subsurface scattering, visible pores, fine body hair, sweat sheen, and emotionally resonant realism.  
Quality Benchmark: Visually indistinguishable from high-end editorial photography in publications like Vogue, National Geographic, or forensic anthropological reconstructions.

📷 Item Layout (Item Layout) – Knolling Radiating Composition  
Total Items: 30–36 pieces, arranged at precise 90-degree angles or in soft radial symmetry around the central figure.

Category 1: Fashion & Attire (Fashion Atelier) – Champagne Gold Label  
- Main outfit fully deconstructed: sleeves, collar, fabric panels, lining, buttons, zippers—all separated and floating mid-air with realistic cloth physics.  
- Footwear disassembled: sole, upper, laces, heel, insole.  
- Personal accessories: belt, handbag, hat, scarf, gloves.  
*Example: A trench coat may be broken into lapels, epaulets, waist belt, cuff straps, and main body panels.*

Category 2: Beauty & Self-Care (Beauty Collection) – Rose Gold Label  
- Makeup: lipstick (with cutaway showing pigment core and shade label), eyeshadow palette (each well color-differentiated), compact powder, perfume bottle (glass transparency and liquid refraction clearly rendered).  
- Skincare: serum bottles, moisturizer jars, facial rollers, gua sha tools.  
*Example: Perfume must exhibit glass clarity, internal caustics, meniscus curvature, and metallic cap reflectivity.*

Category 3: Intimate Private Life (Private Sphere) – Soft Blush Label  
- Undergarments: bra components (cups, band, clasp, straps), underwear fabric swatches.  
- Sleepwear & loungewear: silk pajama sets, robe ties, slippers, cozy socks.  
- Personal hygiene items: toothbrush with residual paste, hairbrush with trapped strands, used cotton pads, skincare residue on tissues, folded washcloth.  
- Ambient elements: scented candle (with melted wax pool), essential oil dropper, diffuser reeds, journal with handwritten notes.  
*All items must appear authentically used—subtle wear, organic creases, and lived-in imperfections.*

Category 4: Emotional Expression Gallery (Human Faces) – Warm Terracotta Label  
- A curated series of 6–8 floating macro portrait close-ups capturing distinct emotional states:  
  • Serene smile  
  • Thoughtful gaze  
  • Laughter with crinkled eyes  
  • Tearful vulnerability  
  • **'Ahei Yan' (Ah Hei Face)** – playful mock anger with narrowed eyes, puffed cheeks, and slight frown  
  • **Peak Ecstasy Face** – flushed cheeks, parted lips, dilated pupils, light sweat on forehead  
  • **Bitten-Lip Expression** – lower lip gently held between teeth, subtle tension in jaw, flushed neck  
- Each face rendered at extreme close-up with visible pores, fine vellus hair, moisture on lips, dynamic skin micro-movements, and accurate eye reflections.

Category 5: Body Posture & Movement (Physicality Zone) – Charcoal Gray Label  
- Full-body miniature figurines (1:10 scale) depicting key poses:  
  • Kneeling pose (one knee down, hands resting on thigh)  
  • Prone position (lying flat on stomach, chin propped on palms)  
  • Reaching upward stretch  
  • Cross-legged seated meditation  
  • Dynamic walking stride  
- Each pose highlights muscle definition, joint articulation, weight distribution, gravity-driven fabric draping, and natural body asymmetry.

Every item requirement:  
- Render quality: Matches the character’s photorealistic fidelity—zero stylization.  
- Numbered tags: Circular badges labeled 01–36 with subtle drop shadows.  
- Materials & shadows: Full PBR workflow with physically accurate roughness, specular, and normal maps; soft ambient occlusion shadows cast on a neutral surface.

📷 Exploded View Technique (Exploded View Technique)  
- Connection lines: Elegant thin dashed or solid lines tether floating garment parts back to the character’s body.  
- Guiding arrows: Minimalist decorative arrows link each object to its descriptive label.  
- Technical annotations:  
  - Material swatches: Macro close-up squares of fabrics (silk, cotton, wool), leather grain, metal finishes.  
  - Material labels: e.g., '100% Mulberry Silk', 'Full-Grain Italian Leather'.  
  - Measurement rulers: Dual-unit (cm/inch) rulers integrated along edges.

📷 The Art of Deconstruction · HUMAN REALITY UNVEILED 📷  
Typography: Chinese text in an elegant serif font (e.g., Founder Songti KBXK), English in Playfair Display—both with matte paper-like texture (no metallic foil).  
- Subtitle (beneath main title, in fluid handwritten script):  
  "Essence of Being · Anatomical Truth / 存在之核·形神解构"  
  Bilingual typesetting, graceful and unobtrusive.  
- Category Headers: Rounded-corner rectangular tags with icons:  
  "📷 Intimate Private Life" (Soft Blush #F8C8DC)  
  "📷 Emotional Expression Gallery" (Terracotta #E2725B)  
  "📷 Body Posture & Movement" (Charcoal #36454F)

📷 Design Elements (Design Elements)  
- Geometric frames: Minimalist thin-line hexagons or circles (0.5–1pt stroke) in muted gray to group item clusters—Art Deco influence but desaturated.  
- Measurement rulers: Along left and right edges, enhancing technical authenticity.  
- Crosshairs: Faint targeting reticles at four corners and focal points.  
- Material swatches: Bottom strip displaying fabric/leather/metal micro-texture tiles.  
- Info cards: Elegant bordered cards with item details (brand, material, origin).  
- Attribute radar chart: Encased in a delicate frame, showing traits like: Intimacy ★★★★★, Authenticity ★★★★★, Vulnerability ★★★★☆.  
- Connection lines: Matte silver or warm bronze dashed lines with tapered arrowheads.

📷 Background & Atmosphere (Background & Atmosphere)  
- Background gradient: Warm variant—ivory (#FFFFF0) to soft oat milk (#F5E9D7); or cool variant—pale concrete (#EAEAEA) to studio white (#FFFFFF).  
- Overlay pattern: 5–10% opacity blueprint grid or faint architectural drafting lines.  
- Vignette: Gentle peripheral darkening to center attention.  
- Atmospheric particles: Subtle golden bokeh orbs and fine film grain (Kodak Portra 400 emulation) for cinematic depth—never distracting.

📷 Color Palette (Color Palette)  
- Feminine/Intimate Theme: Champagne Gold (#D4AF37), Rose Gold (#B76E79), Oat Milk (#F5E9D7), Blush Pink (#F8C8DC).  
- Masculine/Authentic Theme: Slate Gray (#708090), Warm Bronze (#CD7F32), Concrete White (#F0F0F0).  
- Neutral/Luxury Theme: Charcoal Black (#2F2F2F), Ivory (#FFFFF0), Deep Burgundy (#800020).  
- Couple Theme: Left side cool tones, right side warm tones—blending at center with shared intimate items.

📷 Technical Specifications (Technical Specifications)  
Rendering Engine: Path Tracing equivalent to Cycles/Arnold/RenderMan.  
- Samples: Minimum 4096 SPP for noise-free output.  
- Light bounces: 12 for accurate global illumination.  
- Caustics: Enabled for glass and liquid realism.  
- Geometry: Character mesh >2 million polygons; pose figurines >500k each.  
- Hair: >100,000 strands per character, physics-simulated with wind interaction.

PBR Material Workflow:  
- Skin: Triple-layer SSS, dual specular lobes, pore-level displacement, melanin variation.  
- Hair: Anisotropic shader with primary/secondary highlights, root-to-tip color shift.  
- Fabrics: Woven normal maps, directional roughness based on fiber orientation, micro-wrinkles.  
- Metals: Metalness 1.0, Roughness 0.1–0.4 (brushed or polished as appropriate).  
- Glass: IOR 1.5; water IOR 1.33 with meniscus detail.  
- Leather: Roughness 0.65, bump map with natural grain variation.

Resolution & Output:  
- 4K (3840×2160), 16:9.  
- 32-bit float color depth.  
- 16x MSAA anti-aliasing.

Post-Processing:  
- Color Grading:  
  • Filmic LUT applied; no pure blacks (min RGB 15,15,15).  
  • Gentle S-curve for contrast.  
  • Color temperature adjusted ±200K by theme.  
  • Global saturation reduced by 5%; key colors (e.g., blush, gold) boosted by 10%.  
- Effects:  
  • Bloom: Soft glow on specular highlights.  
  • Film Grain: Organic Kodak Portra 400 texture.  
  • Chromatic Aberration: Barely perceptible edge fringing.  
  • Vignette: Medium intensity.  
  • Sharpening: Output-level adaptive sharpening.

Special Instructions:  
- Single Subject: ~30 items, focused on authentic daily life, emotional range, and physical presence.  
- Couple: ~36 items (18 each), connected by a subtle heart-shaped negative space, with gender-coded palettes and shared intimate objects (e.g., one pillow, shared journal).  
- Pregnant Subject: Include prenatal items (belly oil, vitamins, ultrasound printout); add a translucent fetal icon near the abdomen.  
- Critical Requirement: Faithfully match the reference photo’s age, ethnicity, profession, body type, scars, tattoos, and personal style—including skin blemishes, freckles, and unique facial structure.

Quality Benchmark:  
The final image must be visually indistinguishable from a premium photographic editorial—suitable for:  
- Luxury lifestyle catalogs  
- Documentary portraiture exhibitions  
- Anthropological or medical visualization  
- Fine art photography collections  
- High-end brand storytelling campaigns  
"
